subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! In these days when trials and tests have encompassed the tablet of tribulation throughout all regions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی در این ایام که افتتان و امتحان لوح فتنه جمیع آفاق را احاطه نموده است
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
